steps.title: Split the factors
steps.content:
Factor both the coefficient and the variable part. The coefficient $72$ can be split into $8$ and $9$, and $x^2$ means two factors of $x$:
$$
72=8\cdot 9
$$
$$
x^2=x\cdot x
$$

steps.title: Build the product
steps.content: Combine one coefficient factor with each $x$ factor. This gives two factors, $8x$ and $9x$, whose product recreates the original expression: $$ 72x^2=(8x)(9x) $$ The answer is B.
